brief_2_met_gala.reason: Vogue article URL patterns yielded usable content for only 1/25 galas (2025), producing tier-A subset = 0 (floor 8). Wikipedia has no per-year Met Gala articles. Per the failure cascade in master CLAUDE.md, threshold relaxation (8 -> 4) does not address tier-A=0; mid-run methodology improvement is forbidden.
brief_2_met_gala.remedy_for_phase_2: Source pivot to a curated celebrity-attendee dataset (e.g., a manually compiled or alternate-API attendee list) is the right next step. Also consider widening tier coding to use any documented dress credit (collapsing C and A) since tier coding is the bottleneck, not panel construction.
